energy_p50.rationale: Night-heavy Sleep bonus (+1.2) lets cats consolidate rest in a single phase rather than napping erratically. Baseline seed-42 soak: 0.44; target ~0.55. Softer than a phase-agnostic +1.2 would produce because Day naps are suppressed (bonus 0.1).

mood_valence_p50.rationale: Contentment modifier in src/systems/mood.rs fires when physiological_satisfaction >= contentment_phys_threshold. Consolidated Night sleep raises energy high enough for phys_satisfaction to cross the threshold and hold. Baseline 0.19; target ~0.21 — crossing the mating mood_floor (0.2).

kittens_born.rationale: Breeding gate requires mood_valence > 0.2 (breeding_mood_floor). Baseline seed-42 soak: 0 kittens born in 15 min. Once mood crosses 0.2 during Night sleep windows, mating becomes eligible. Expect 1–3 kittens.

sleep_share_night.rationale: At Night the Sleep bonus (+1.2) dominates fulfillment-tier action scores (typically 1.4–2.0). Conditional share: of snapshots taken at Night, the fraction with current_action==Sleep should rise substantially over the phase-agnostic baseline.

sleep_share_day.rationale: Day bonus (+0.1) is a tie-break, not a pull. At energy >= 0.5, fulfillment activities (PracticeMagic, Explore, Socialize) win. Exhausted cats may still nap, which is the intended pressure-release valve.

deaths_by_cause.Starvation.rationale: Canary gate — must remain 0 on seed 42. The phase-bias change redistributes rest across the day; it doesn't affect hunger/foraging dynamics. Flagged as a prediction so the verification pass checks it explicitly.

deaths_by_cause.ShadowFoxAmbush.rationale: Canary gate — must remain <= 5 on seed 42. Small drift acceptable in either direction. Phase 2 (not this PR) will redistribute ambushes by phase; Phase 1 should not materially move this number.
